subject: session date
fact: The session date is May 25th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 25th, 2026

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party settled into a stretch of rest deep within Sporedome.
source_quote: deep within Sporedome

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a luminous fungal expanse of the Underdark.
source_quote: the luminous fungal expanse of the Underdark

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur constructed a specialized distillery using his artificer's mind.
source_quote: Felkur put his artificer's mind to work constructing a specialized distillery

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas refined hallucinogenic mushrooms into potent concoctions with Felkur.
source_quote: together with Akritas, the two refined the unique hallucinogenic mushrooms of the region into potent concoctions

subject: Daein
fact: Daein turned his attention toward future business ventures including soups and trade.
source_quote: Daein, ever the entrepreneur, turned his attention toward future business ventures — soups, trade, and the dream of fabulous wealth

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim sprinted naked through the fungus forest.
source_quote: him sprinting naked through the fungus forest

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: A messenger from the Emerald Enclave arrived to summon Akritas.
source_quote: a messenger from the Emerald Enclave arrived to summon Akritas

subject: Harper
fact: The Harpers are part of a coalition of powerful factions.
source_quote: a coalition of powerful factions — the Emerald Enclave, the Harpers, the Lords' Alliance, and the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Lords' Alliance
fact: The Lords' Alliance is part of a coalition of powerful factions.
source_quote: a coalition of powerful factions — the Emerald Enclave, the Harpers, the Lords' Alliance, and the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Order of the Gauntlet is part of a coalition of powerful factions.
source_quote: a coalition of powerful factions — the Emerald Enclave, the Harpers, the Lords' Alliance, and the Order of the Gauntlet

fact: A messenger summoned Akritas on behalf of a coalition.
source_quote: summon Akritas on behalf of a coalition of powerful factions

subject: FU money declaration
fact: Daein declared his singular ambition to acquire what he called FU money.
source_quote: loudly declaring his singular ambition to acquire what he called "FU money"

subject: party agreement
fact: The group agreed to attend the meeting.
source_quote: Eventually, the group agreed

subject: ledger realization
fact: Akritas noted they had missed a golden opportunity by never reading the ledger from their previous heist.
source_quote: they had missed a golden opportunity by never reading the ledger from their previous heist

subject: meeting place
fact: The meeting took place inside a hollowed-out dead mushroom roughly the size of a small house.
source_quote: inside a hollowed-out dead mushroom roughly the size of a small house

subject: Glor
fact: Glor greeted the party telepathically.
source_quote: A cowled humanoid figure greeted them telepathically, introducing itself as Glor

subject: Glor
fact: Glor is a mind flayer.
source_quote: the party came to understand they were speaking with a mind flayer

subject: Ryxyg illithid encampment
fact: Glor is a representative of the Ryxyg illithid encampment.
source_quote: a representative of the Ryxyg illithid encampment located several miles below Sporedome

subject: Ryxyg illithid encampment
fact: Glor claimed his community chose peaceful cohabitation over enslavement and conquest.
source_quote: his community had chosen peaceful cohabitation with other Underdark species over the enslavement and conquest typical of his kind

subject: fire giant threat
fact: Glor claimed the fire giants of Maerimydra had constructed devastating arcane siege weapons.
source_quote: The fire giants of Maerimydra had constructed devastating arcane siege weapons

subject: targeted cities
fact: The fire giants were preparing to unleash their weapons on Elventree and Hillsfar.
source_quote: preparing to unleash them on the surface world, beginning with Elventree and Hillsfar

subject: deal struck
fact: A deal was struck between the party and Glor.
source_quote: A deal was struck

subject: map handover
fact: Glor handed over a map.
source_quote: Glor handed over a map

subject: map
fact: Glor handed the party a map.
source_quote: Glor handed over a map

subject: travel to lair
fact: Ten days of travel through the Underdark brought the party to the rogue's lair.
source_quote: Ten days of travel through the Underdark brought the party to the rogue's lair

subject: rogue mind flayer lair
fact: The party arrived at the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: brought the party to the rogue's lair

subject: Faerzress exposure
fact: The Faerzress grew so thick that a constant mental buzz settled over each party member.
source_quote: Faerzress growing so thick in the final stretch that a constant mental buzz settled over each of them

subject: ammunition preparation
fact: Felkur prepared specialized ice-infused ammunition.
source_quote: Felkur prepared specialized ice-infused ammunition for the confrontation ahead

subject: mind flayer
fact: The party concluded that whatever lived in the lair was a mind flayer based on the bodies.
source_quote: Whatever lived here was unmistakably a mind flayer

subject: victim discovery
fact: Four bodies were arranged around a table in the lair.
source_quote: four bodies — three human men and a drow woman — were arranged around a table

subject: brain removal
fact: Four holes were bored into the crown of each skull and the brains were removed.
source_quote: four holes bored into the crown of each skull, and the brains had been cleanly removed through them

subject: intelligence maps
fact: Detailed maps of Hillsfar, Phlan, and Mulmaster were spread across the table.
source_quote: detailed maps of Hillsfar, Phlan — a city now encased in a dome of magical brambles by a green dragon — and two maps of Mulmaster

subject: Red Blooms
fact: Crumbled parchments outlined mercantile agreements between an unnamed drow outpost and the Red Blooms.
source_quote: crumpled parchments outlining mercantile agreements between an unnamed drow outpost and a group called the Red Blooms

subject: stone basin
fact: A stone basin carved to resemble the underside of a human brain was in the room.
source_quote: stone basin carved to resemble the underside of a human brain

subject: door mechanism
fact: The party concluded the stone basin served as the key to an arcanely sealed door.
source_quote: the party concluded it served as the key to an arcanely sealed door

subject: brain key requirement
fact: The arcanely sealed door could only be opened by placing an actual brain inside the stone basin.
source_quote: one that could only be opened by placing an actual brain inside it

fact: A voice from behind one door was recognized by Daein as Arrizz.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow.

subject: Arrizz imprisonment
fact: Arrizz was apparently imprisoned behind one of the doors.
source_quote: With Arrizz apparently imprisoned somewhere beyond the first door

subject: second door
fact: The second door was noticeably colder than anything else in the lair.
source_quote: The second door was noticeably colder than anything else in the lair

fact: The rogue mind flayer's lair holds secrets and danger yet to be uncovered.
source_quote: the rogue mind flayer's lair stretching out before them, full of secrets and danger yet to be uncovered

fact: Bramgrim consumed hallucinogenic Underdark mushrooms.

fact: Bramgrim was found running naked through the fungus forest.

source_quote: A stone basin found in the first chamber of the rogue's lair

subject: Brain Basin
fact: The Brain Basin is carved to resemble the underside of a human brain.
source_quote: carved to resemble the underside of a human brain.

subject: Brain Basin deduction
fact: The party deduced the basin serves as a macabre biological lock for a nearby arcanely sealed door.
source_quote: The party deduced it serves as a macabre biological lock for a nearby arcanely sealed door

subject: Brain Basin operation
fact: The basin requires an actual brain to be placed inside to open the door.
source_quote: requiring an actual brain to be placed inside to open it.

subject: Glor
fact: Glor provided a map illustrating the path of least resistance through the Underdark to the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: A map provided by Glor illustrating the path of least resistance through the Underdark to the rogue mind flayer's lair

subject: journey to rogue's lair
fact: The journey to the rogue mind flayer's lair is estimated to take approximately ten days.
source_quote: with the journey estimated to take approximately ten days.

subject: Arcane Lock placement
fact: A powerful magical seal was placed upon a door in the rogue's lair.
source_quote: A powerful magical seal placed upon a door in the rogue's lair

subject: Arcane Lock
fact: The Arcane Lock renders the door immune to mechanical tampering.
source_quote: rendering it immune to mechanical tampering.

subject: Arcane Lock discovery
fact: The party discovered the Arcane Lock could not be bypassed by conventional means.
source_quote: The party discovered it could not be bypassed by conventional means

subject: Arcane Lock bypass method
fact: The Arcane Lock required a biological key — a brain placed in the nearby basin — to open.
source_quote: and instead required a biological key — a brain placed in the nearby basin — to open.
